lever: compact-WY large real QR with QR-local no-pack single-thread panel apply

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(qr_128x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

proof.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib qr -- --nocapture

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-fh5q1-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(qr_128x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: Small k < 256 stayed on the existing scalar path; large path changed reflector grouping, so exact large-QR FP order was not claimed.
isomorphism.tie_breaking_unchanged: No pivoting, comparisons, or rank decisions were introduced.
isomorphism.floating_point: Small QR bit-golden preserved; large QR invariant proof passed but the candidate failed the performance gate.

rejection_reason: Target QR row regressed from a 137.86 ms baseline family to 3.1293 s candidate; source was restored before commit.
next_primitive: Stop no-pack compact-WY apply for QR. Attack a different QR primitive: communication-avoiding/tall-skinny blocked QR or a cache-oblivious panel algorithm with a true register-tiled update and an explicit large-QR tolerance contract; target >=2.0 score on linalg/qr_1024x1024_f64.
